2604.26508.title: Progressive Semantic Communication for Efficient Edge-Cloud Vision-Language Models
2604.26508.paper_summary: Deploying Vision-Language Models (VLMs) on edge devices remains challenging due to their substantial computational and memory demands, which exceed the capabilities of resource-constrained embedded platforms. Conversely, fully offloading inference to the cloud is often impractical in bandwidth-limited environments, where transmitting raw visual data introduces substantial latency overhead. While recent edge-cloud collaborative architectures attempt to partition VLM workloads across devices, they typically rely on transmitting fixed-size representations, lacking adaptability to dynamic network conditions and failing to fully exploit semantic redundancy. In this paper, we propose a progressive semantic communication framework for edge-cloud VLM inference, using a Meta AutoEncoder that compresses visual tokens into adaptive, progressively refinable representations, enabling plug-and-play deployment with off-the-shelf VLMs without additional fine-tuning. This design allows flexible transmission at different information levels, providing a controllable trade-off between communication cost and semantic fidelity. We implement a full end-to-end edge-cloud system comprising an embedded NXP i.MX95 platform and a GPU server, communicating over bandwidth-constrained networks. Experimental results show that, at 1 Mbps uplink, the proposed progressive scheme significantly reduces network latency compared to full-edge and full-cloud solutions, while maintaining high semantic consistency even under high compression. The implementation code will be released upon publication at https://github.com/open-ep/ProSemComVLM.
2604.26508.paper_summary_zh: 在邊緣設備上部署視覺-語言模型（VLM）仍然具有挑戰性，因為其龐大的計算和記憶體需求超出了資源受限的嵌入式平台的能力。相反，將推斷完全卸載到雲端在帶寬受限的環境中通常是不切實際的，因為傳輸原始視覺數據會引入顯著的延遲開銷。雖然最近的邊緣-雲協作架構試圖在設備之間劃分VLM工作負載，但它們通常依賴於傳輸固定大小的表示，缺乏對動態網絡條件的適應性，並未充分利用語義冗餘。在本文中，我們提出了一個漸進式語義通信框架，用於邊緣-雲VLM推斷，使用一種Meta AutoEncoder將視覺標記壓縮為自適應的、漸進可細化的表示，實現與現成VLM的即插即用部署，而無需額外的微調。這種設計允許在不同信息級別進行靈活傳輸，提供通信成本和語義保真度之間的可控權衡。我們實現了一個完整的端到端邊緣-雲系統，包含嵌入式NXP i.MX95平台和GPU伺服器，通過帶寬受限的網絡進行通信。實驗結果顯示，在1 Mbps的上行帶寬下，所提出的漸進式方案顯著減少了網絡延遲，相較於全邊緣和全雲解決方案，同時在高壓縮下仍保持高語義一致性。實現代碼將在發表時釋出，網址為 https://github.com/open-ep/ProSemComVLM。
2604.26508.author: Cyril Shih-Huan Hsu et.al.
2604.26508.authors: Cyril Shih-Huan Hsu, Wig Yuan-Cheng Cheng, Chrysa Papagianni
